title: Fragrant Crispy Japanese Garlic Bulb Katsudon
description: A yeasty, crisp, show-off Japanese dish featuring garlic bulb, ferment-jang, and pescatarian-friendly ingredients in a katsudon form, cooked in a kadhai vessel.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together flour, yeast, and salt.
Gradually add water to the bowl and mix until a smooth dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until it becomes elastic.
Place the dough in a greased kadhai and let it rise for 30 minutes.
Preheat the kadhai over medium heat and add vegetable oil.
Add garlic cloves to the kadhai and saute until fragrant.
Add shrimp to the kadhai and cook until pink and fully cooked.
Add ferment-jang to the kadhai and stir-fry for 1 minute.
Place the risen dough in the kadhai and press down gently.
Cook the katsudon for 5 minutes on each side until crispy and golden brown.
